_meta.description: Single source of truth (SSOT) for AbEngineCore standard paths, version labels, primary config files, and selected runtime pipeline policies. Edit ONLY this file for pipeline identity/policy; then run sync + validation scripts.
_meta.governance: LOCKED tier standards/docs still require owner approval to edit; SSOT drives drift detection vs registry + generates docs/_generated/ for human-readable alignment.
_meta.policy_scope_note: Runtime policies below are intended to prevent drift between VHH algorithm/process decisions and management/reporting tools.

standards.config_note: Primary execution: v490.json (_meta.version 5.5.1). V5.5.1 (2026-05-09): client-safe reporting patch for the V5.5.0 post-humanization paired Fv naturalness QC gate. Customer-facing outputs use Paired Fv Naturalness QC and show only PASS/WARN/FAIL plus recommended action; internal JSON retains p_abnativ2.paired_humanness and pairing_likelihood. Gate behavior remains V5.5.0: paired_humanness <0.70 = FAIL, 0.70-0.80 = WARN, >=0.80 = PASS, target >=0.83. Inherits V5.4.3 Balanced CMC Polish and V5.4.0 structure-driven fallback.

standards.display_name: CrossSpecies Engine — meta-standard for cross-species antibody engineering (SR-1.0 / DFR-1.0 / AG-1.0)
standards.config_note: Engine-layer meta-standard; parallel to (never replaces) species standards. Three frozen tracks: SR-1.0 Surface Reshaping (always available), DFR-1.0 DeepFR (frequency + 4 structural vetoes: hallmark / Cys / SASA<5 Å² / CDR-proximal <5 Å), AG-1.0 Anchor Graft (clinically validated acceptors only). Forbidden: naive merged mutation union without three-gate re-screen; AG-1.0 on dog/cat VHH (no canine/feline single-domain clinical scaffold). Promoted from V0.1 by owner approval 2026-05-07.

Standard doc V1.2.0: §3.5 FR4 — default universal_clinical (UP-FR4: VH WGQGTLVTVSS; VLκ FGQGTKLEIK; VLλ FGGGTHLTVL); CLI flag --fr4-strategy {universal_clinical,donor_retention}; implementation petization_cli_v1.3.0 in scripts/run_petization_pipeline.py. V1.0.1+: §2.4 felinization Track A vs Track B (B default for new cat programs). 3-track auto-routing (graft_vernier / surface_reshaping / deep_fr_anchor); species-aware CMC; internal-only API (/internal/petization/run, /internal/pet-console). Registry cohort key unchanged: release_id V1.0.0_Petization (see abenginecore_registry pipeline_release_matrix). Ops: docs/PETIZATION_CAT_DUAL_TRACK_V1.md.

standards.display_name: VHH humanization Path A (camelid / clinical VHH)
standards.config_note: V5.0 (2026-05-16, Owner-approved Evolution Log): Structure-driven upgrade with five mandatory changes. (1) Template library: clinical-VHH only (drop 90 synthetic VH3-SAFE). (2) FR identity cutoff lowered 0.70->0.65 (permissive 0.60 with audit log). (3) Hallmark decisions driven by CDR3 length + SAP/pI: FULL (CDR3>=17aa AND SAP>0.714), PARTIAL (CDR3 12-17aa AND pI<=9.0), MINIMAL (CDR3<12aa AND net_basic<=4). (4) Non-Hallmark back-mutation requires IgFold/ABodyBuilder2 structure prediction + SASA + CDR-distance + DeepFR-CTX 9-mer voting; dynamic Tier per template. (5) No-template fallback: DeepFR-CTX-VHH 9-aa context voting (config/clinical_842_9mer_db.json), G/P/C hard-protected. V4.0 prescreen gates retained (CDR3 hard >=25aa, SAP hard >0.771).

V1.8.17 (2026-05-16, Owner-approved alignment): Governing standard VH_TO_VHH_CONVERSION_STANDARD_V1.8.md § header V1.8.17. Inherits V1.8.16 structure SASA gate (Section 1a.2; scripts/structure_sasa_v1816.py). Adds Stealth tier net_basic/pI-conditional routing (NONE/MINIMAL/STANDARD/FULL), Y91/F91 + W103 monitoring metrics (scripts/run_cd3_v1817.py cohort notes). Public Console/API deployment branch identifier: V1.8.17.IGHV3 — same algorithm standard with IGHV3-family-only pre-flight gate on POST /vh_to_vhh/*.

V1.7 (2026-06-02, owner-approved alignment): canonicalizes (1) Stage-5 MM/GBSA per-site WT-self repack baseline as mandatory (AffinityEnergyToolkit.run_mmgbsa_selfref; ddg_corrected = dg(mut) - dg(WT_self@site); asymmetric WT baseline forbidden); (2) CHECK 6 coordinate = IMGT-segmented CDR index (CDR1 27-38 / CDR2 56-65 / CDR3 105-117), union enumeration index forbidden, out-of-range = NOT_RUN; (3) CHECK 7 coordinate = PDB chain_records authoritative linear index, cdr_start+union_index forbidden. Reliability: single-frame MM/GBSA on flexible short peptide is corroboration-only (EvoEF2 primary + cross-tool sign agreement); HADDOCK3 optional/non-additive for <=30aa flexible-peptide Scenario A (Boltz-2 + lightweight relax is the accepted Stage-0 source). Inherits V1.6.1: Boltz-2 PRIMARY Stage 0, AF3 server PROHIBITED, Scenario A dual gate ipTM>=0.80 + PAE<5.0A, CHECK 1-8. Standard_file corrected to the existing parent doc (former V1.6 path was dangling).

standards.display_name: De Novo CDR Design & Patent Escape
standards.config_note: V5.2 (2026-05-01) alignment with VAM V1.6.1: Boltz-2 Stage 0; mandatory CHECK 6 Fingerprint Prior (FH-358/VHH-71); short-peptide dual gate; AF3 server prohibited.

standards.display_name: Sequence Delivery — retrieval, assembly, codon optimization, and QA
standards.config_note: Unified CHO-1.0 codon table; standardized SP+V+C assembly; multi-gate QA (diff/GC/stop/FR4).

standards.display_name: CMC Developability Assessment and Mutation Policy
standards.config_note: V1.4.0 (2026-05-15): Smart-CMC safety upgrade. (1) Mandatory aggregation-motif lookahead guard. (2) CDR-driven hydrophobic patch detection and suppression. (3) Adaptive pI/net_charge safe-zone trimming (p25-p75). (4) Integrated CDR Fingerprint metrics (all_cdr_gravy) for both VH/VL and VHH. Removed acid_density due to reference data absence.

use_9aa_ctx_oas_assist_when: DEEP-FR fails affinity retention or structure-conservation gates
Graft+Vernier fails affinity retention or structure-conservation gates
minimal framework disruption is preferred over maximum humanness score
VL is already human-compatible and VH requires targeted FR cleanup only
do_not_use_9aa_ctx_oas_assist_as: replacement for DEEP-FR humanness maximization baseline
standalone acceptance without CMC veto and global sanity check
strategy_policy.9aa_ctx_oas_assist_definition: Clinical-842 VH/VK 9-mer context is the primary evidence source; OAS human 9-mers are auxiliary population support; BLOSUM adaptive ratio, protected-position tiers, CMC veto, and global sanity rollback remain mandatory.
strategy_policy.deepfr_ctx_definition: DeepFR-CTX combines DeepFR framework humanization with 9AA contextual clinical/OAS guard-and-rescue filtering. DeepFR proposes the high-humanness FR candidate; 9AA-CTX audits each changed FR residue, rescues OAS-supported DeepFR residues, and rolls back only hard CMC/structure vetoes to the donor residue. Formal implementation: core/humanization/ctx_guard.py::apply_deepfr_ctx.
strategy_policy.deepfr_ctx_cmc_definition: DeepFR-CTX-CMC is a developability-optimized variant of DeepFR-CTX. It applies a Balanced CMC Polish layer (FR-only conservative substitutions) to maximize the ADI score and maintain clinical-range hydrophobicity (GRAVY), while ensuring structural conservation and HPR > 0.80.

datasets.oas_source: promb human-oas; OAS 9-mers present in >=10% of subjects; binary presence/absence support

lead_selection_policy_v27.fallback_rule: If no evaluated candidate passes all hard gates, retain ranking Top-1 for comparison only and annotate the report.

conventional_vh._v1817_note: V1.8.17 (2026-05-16): (1) Stealth tier changed from CDR3-length-based to net_basic/pI-conditional (NONE net_basic<=2 / MINIMAL 3-4 / STANDARD 5-6 / FULL >=7 or pI>=9.0). Structural audit (n=6 CD3 Fv panel, ABodyBuilder2): all Stealth K positions are surface-exposed in Fv (SASA ~94 A2) — NOT VL-shielded. Stealth = charge management only. (2) Y91/F91 and W103 added as monitoring metrics (no mutation). n=130 VHH cohort: CDR3-drape on Y91 confirmed (r=-0.23, p=0.008) but effect size small. Hallmark (L45R/W47G/G44E) and VL-safety SASA gate (50 A2 threshold) UNCHANGED from V1.8.16. Script: scripts/run_cd3_v1817.py
